title: MapShot
description: A mod that allows players to take better screenshots of maps.
body:
# Map Shot A Minecraft mod that allows players to take better screenshots of maps. ## How to take a map screenshot Press F12 (can be re-binded in Options -> Controls -> Keybinds) to open up the Map Screenshot GUI. You can increase or decrease the size of the screenshot by adjusting the **scale**. Press **Save map as screenshot** to create the screenshot. ![2025-03-11_19 36 46](https://github.com/user-attachments/assets/5f8414b9-d41a-4b77-be83-10ce6dbff58f)
